text.title: python Failure Modes
text.summary: Five antipatterns each with symptom / root-cause / fix.

antipattern.description: Business logic in Django views (DB calls + branching + side effects).
antipattern.symptom: views.py grows past 500 lines; tests require the full Django HTTP stack; cron / CLI cannot reuse the logic.
antipattern.root-cause: Django tutorials place logic in views; no enforced services/ layer.
antipattern.fix: Extract into services.py functions receiving domain types; views shrink to bind-validate-call-translate; cron/CLI call services directly.

antipattern.symptom: Total latency = sum of awaits; profiler shows long sequential waits where parallel is possible.
antipattern.root-cause: Habit from sync Python; ignoring that awaits are not parallel by themselves.
antipattern.fix: Use `asyncio.gather(*calls)` or `async with TaskGroup() as tg: tg.create_task(...)` for independent calls.

antipattern.symptom: Legacy-style imports proliferate; codebase carries `from typing import Optional, List, Dict`.
antipattern.root-cause: Inherited from 3.8-era code; agents copy older patterns.
antipattern.fix: Replace with `X | None` and `list[int]`. ruff `UP` ruleset auto-fixes.

antipattern.description: black + isort + flake8 retained alongside ruff.
antipattern.symptom: Pre-commit hook flips formatting on every run; rule conflicts between tools.
antipattern.fix: Remove black/isort/flake8 from pre-commit + poetry deps; keep only ruff (lint + format).

antipattern.description: Multi-step DB ops not wrapped in @transaction.atomic.
antipattern.symptom: Partial writes on error; data inconsistency when one of multiple INSERTs fails.
antipattern.root-cause: Missing transaction boundary at the service entry.
antipattern.fix: Wrap the service function or the relevant block with `@transaction.atomic` (sync) / `async with transaction.atomic()` (async).
